nasb.text: I will sing to the Lord as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.

esv.text: I will sing to the Lord  as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have being.

cnv.text: 我一生要向耶和華歌唱； 我還在世的時候，我要向我的　神歌頌。

ccb.text: 我要一生一世向耶和华歌唱， 我一息尚存就要赞美上帝。

csbs.text: 我一生要向耶和华歌唱； 我还活着的时候，要歌颂我的神。
